title: ANIMA w_lr binding diagnostic: interior optimum at 0.0003

content.purpose: Determine whether w_lr, tau, gamma are binding constraints on ANIMA MI gap. If binding with interior optimum, candidate for Stage 2 adaptive parameter.

methodology.phase1: 5-seed binding diagnostic (w_lr, tau, gamma varied independently). Binding criterion: range > 2× avg within-condition std.
methodology.phase2: 10-seed extended sweep for w_lr and gamma to characterize landscape shape.

w_lr.note: Below 2× threshold but monotonically decreasing (lower=better). Extended sweep needed.

interpretation.w_lr: INTERIOR OPTIMUM at 0.0003 — classic inverted-U. Too high: W learns fast, err shrinks, I starves. Too low: W doesn't learn, err is noise, I accumulates garbage. Sweet spot: W tracks structure slowly enough that meaningful errors persist for I accumulation.
interpretation.tau: Non-binding. Flat landscape. Consistent with Living Seed c032.
interpretation.gamma: Boundary-optimal at 3.0 (monotonically increasing). Calibration-only, same pattern as Living Seed delta (c035).
interpretation.w_lr_k_independence: w_lr optimum is K-independent because w_lr acts on intra-signal timescale (fixed 60-step windows), unlike tau which acts on inter-signal timescale (K-dependent, c031).

constraints_implied: c044: ANIMA w_lr interior optimum at 0.0003 (10-seed confirmed). Canonical w_lr updated from 0.01 to 0.0003. Improvement: 3.5× MI gap.
c045: ANIMA tau non-binding in [0.1, 0.7] range. Consistent with Living Seed c032. Do not attempt tau adaptation.
c046: ANIMA gamma boundary-optimal (monotonically increasing to 3.0). Calibration-only, not adaptive opportunity.
